summary: Replayed ADR 0308 from the latest synchronized origin/main baseline at repository version 0.177.136 and platform version 0.130.85, verified the operator provisioning execution surface end to end, repaired the Windmill gate-status and detached-worktree checkout path, and then fixed a latest-main regression in the shared Docker bridge-chain assertion that the exact-main Windmill converge exposed. The branch-local closeout also refreshed the generated platform manifest and agent-coordination diagram, reconciled shared-contract ownership for the overlapping ADR 0308 and validation surfaces, and proved that the remaining branch-local automation delta before merge-to-main is only the intentional pending-release changelog update.

verification.observed: make preflight WORKFLOW=operator-onboard passed on the rebased exact-main tree and proved the new fail-closed health checks for Keycloak discovery, the private OpenBao mTLS listener, and the private Windmill API.

The exact-main test bundle covering Docker bridge-chain retries, controller worktree path resolution, validation-gate Windmill contracts, operator-manager dry-run behavior, and the operator-onboard preflight controller path passed with 45 tests.

verification.check: Exact-main Windmill converge regression discovery and repair
verification.observed: The first exact-main make converge-windmill env=production replay failed truthfully because the shared Docker nat-chain assertion evaluated stale post-retry state after the chain had already recovered. Refreshing the final nat and forward probes in collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/common/tasks/docker_bridge_chains.yml removed the false failure, and the second exact-main replay then passed with docker-runtime-lv3 ok=331 changed=45 failed=0, postgres-lv3 ok=93 changed=2 failed=0, and proxmox_florin ok=41 changed=4 failed=0.

The exact-main Windmill dry run against f/lv3/operator_onboard returned status ok, preserved the generated operator state path under /srv/proxmox_florin_server/.local/state/operator-access/, and resolved the managed roster path config/operators.yaml.

The controller-local fallback path succeeded from the detached git worktree after platform/repo.py learned how to resolve shared .local assets from the parent repository root, proving the controller can still inspect operator inventory through the Proxmox jump path.

scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate and scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards both passed. The first full validate replay then exposed overlapping exclusive ownership claims on ADR 0308 and other shared platform surfaces; after converting those paths to shared-contract ownership and adding the generated artifact surfaces, scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces passed and the rerun reduced the remaining local failure to the intentional pre-release canonical-truth delta on changelog.md.

verification.check: Remote validate replay after generated artifact refresh
verification.observed: The first remote-validate replay exposed stale build/platform-manifest.json and docs/diagrams/agent-coordination-map.excalidraw after the new receipt and workstream metadata landed. Regenerating those artifacts and updating the ownership manifest let the third replay pass every remote lane, including workstream-surfaces, schema-validation, dependency-graph, ansible-syntax, and iac-policy-scan.

verification.check: Pre-push gate closeout on branch-local truth
verification.observed: make pre-push-gate passed every heavy lane on both the remote primary path and the local fallback, and isolated the only remaining branch-local failure to generated-docs because changelog.md intentionally still reflects the pre-release truth until merge-to-main updates the protected release surfaces.

notes: The committed replay source for the exact-main verification is b97c0d5bc20619229829525d49a7e07f6a48ebbf, which already includes the Docker bridge-chain assertion repair discovered during the latest-main converge replay.

The first live platform implementation of ADR 0308 was already true on platform version 0.130.85; this receipt captures the exact-main replay, the contract corrections, and the repo automation needed to make that live shape reproducible from source control.

Protected integration surfaces still remain for merge-to-main after this branch-local receipt: VERSION, changelog.md, the top-level README.md summary, and versions/stack.yaml should only move when the final integrated mainline tree is ready.

The branch-local validation bundle is intentionally truthful rather than artificially green: make validate and make pre-push-gate now isolate the same single remaining delta, the pending changelog.md update that belongs to the protected mainline release step.
